corrections.text: Two direct quotes attributed to Yahoo Finance — 'Everyone I met was highly competent and cared a great deal about doing the right thing' and 'SpaceXAI had already moved training to Colossus 2' — cannot be independently verified from the local source snapshot because Yahoo Finance redirected to consent.yahoo.com. Tom's Hardware paraphrases similar substance ('senior members of the company [...] understand what they do to ensure Claude is good for humanity'; 'as the company focuses on building Colossus 2') but the exact verbatim wording is not in any of the three openly-fetched snapshots. The substance of the claims is corroborated; the specific verbatim attribution is unverifiable.
